steps.title: Apply the right shift
steps.content:
A shift $5$ units to the right replaces $x$ with $x-5$.
$$f(x-5)=\frac{a-17}{x-5}+6$$

steps.title: Apply the downward shift
steps.content: A shift $2$ units down subtracts $2$ from the whole function. $$g(x)=f(x-5)-2$$ $$g(x)=\frac{a-17}{x-5}+6-2$$ $$g(x)=\frac{a-17}{x-5}+4$$ The answer is B.
